headline: Bath & Body Works’ Ulta Beauty launch may expand reach, but channel shift risks remain: Jefferies
summary: Bath & Body Works Inc (NYSE:BBWI) is preparing to launch a curated assortment of products at Ulta Beauty stores and online in July, a move that analysts at Jefferies said could broaden the retailer's distribution and customer discovery opportunities while facing limitations from store...

headline: Why Bath and Body Works (BBWI) Stock Is Trading Up Today
summary: Shares of personal care and home fragrance retailer Bath & Body Works (NYSE:BBWI) jumped 3.5% in the morning session after it announced a partnership with Ulta Beauty to sell its products in Ulta stores.

headline: Did Ulta’s (ULTA) Bath & Body Works Tie-Up Redefine Its Assortment and Wellness Investment Narrative?
summary: Bath & Body Works has announced a partnership with Ulta Beauty to sell a curated range of its body care and home fragrance products in more than 600 Ulta stores across the US and on Ulta.com, starting July 12, 2026. The tie-up gives Ulta fresh exclusives, such as the limited-return Juniper Breeze scent and mini discovery sets, enriching its position as a one-stop beauty and self-care destination. We’ll now examine how adding Bath & Body Works’ curated assortment could influence Ulta Beauty’s...

headline: Ulta Beauty (ULTA) Brings Bath And Body Works To More Than 600 Stores
summary: Ulta Beauty (NasdaqGS:ULTA) is partnering with Bath & Body Works to roll out an exclusive assortment across more than 600 Ulta stores. The collection includes core Bath & Body Works products plus limited-edition items, such as the return of the Juniper Breeze scent and exclusive mini fragrance sets. Bath & Body Works products are also being added to Ulta’s online channel, marking their first broad presence within Ulta’s ecosystem. Ulta Beauty enters this partnership with its shares at...

summary: Ulta Beauty, Inc. (NASDAQ:ULTA) is one of the top cheap growth stocks to get rich. Argus cut the price target on Ulta Beauty, Inc. (NASDAQ:ULTA) to $550 from $615 on June 18 and reiterated a Buy rating on the shares, stating that the stock’s shares have underperformed over the past quarter, falling 13%, compared to gains […]

headline: Kohl's (KSS) Adds Veteran Operator Elliott Rodgers as COO Is Its Turnaround Strategy Evolving?
summary: In June 2026, Kohl's Corporation appointed Elliott Rodgers as Chief Operating Officer, putting him in charge of nearly 1,200 stores, global supply chain and distribution centers, procurement, and loss prevention, reporting to CEO Michael J. Bender. Rodgers' deep experience in retail operations, supply chain, and technology at Foot Locker, Ulta Beauty, Target, and project44 adds operational depth as Kohl's pursues its turnaround agenda and reinforces its focus on merchandise productivity,...

headline: Bath & Body Works (BBWI) Inks New Deal, Shares Climb Higher
summary: Bath & Body Works Inc. (NYSE:BBWI) is one of the 10 Resilient Stocks Beating Market Slump. Bath & Body Works bounced back by 5.55 percent on Tuesday to end at $20.72 apiece as investors cheered its partnership with Ulta Beauty for the nationwide distribution of its products in the latter’s online platform and physical stores. […]
